title: How Heat Waves Affect Your Body

scenes.text: Heatwaves can transform the way your body feels!
They can lead to dehydration and heat exhaustion if not managed.
Your body struggles to regulate temperature, which can lead to heat-related illnesses.
Staying cool is essential for health during extreme heat.
scenes.label: STAYING COOL

scenes.text: Follow to feed your curious mind daily.

description: Heatwaves can lead to dehydration and affect your body’s ability to regulate temperature. Follow for more health science!
